title: chaneph #2610
definition:
1) to be profaned, be defiled, be polluted, be corrupt
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be polluted
        1a2) to be profane, be godless
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to pollute
        1b2) to make profane, make godless, cause to be defiled
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be profaned, be defiled, be polluted, be corrupt
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be polluted
        1a2) to be profane, be godless
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to pollute
        1b2) to make profane, make godless, cause to be defiled

    NASB:  to be polluted or profane
